translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Paul and Silvanus and Timotheus to the assembly of Thessalonians inGod our Father and [the] Lord Jesus Christ.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Grace to you, and peace fromGod our Father, and [the] Lord Jesus Christ.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: We ought to thankGod always for you, brethren, even as it is meet, because your faith increases exceedingly, and the love of each one of you all towards one another abounds;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: so that we ourselves make our boast in you in the assemblies ofGod for your endurance and faith in all your persecutions and tribulations, which ye are sustaining;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: a manifest token of the righteous judgment ofGod, to the end that ye should be counted worthy of the kingdom ofGod, for the sake of which ye also suffer;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: if at least [it is a] righteous thing withGod to render tribulation to those that trouble you,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and to you that are troubled repose with us, at the revelation of the Lord Jesus from heaven, with [the] angels of his power,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: in flaming fire taking vengeance on those who know notGod, and those who do not obey the glad tidings of our Lord Jesus Christ;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: who shall pay the penalty [of] everlasting destruction from [the] presence of the Lord, and from the glory of his might,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: when he shall have come to be glorified in his saints, and wondered at in all that have believed, (for our testimony to you has been believed,) in that day.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To which end we also pray always for you, that ourGod may count you worthy of the calling, and fulfil all [the] good pleasure of [his] goodness and [the] work of faith with power,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: so that the name of our Lord Jesus [Christ] may be glorified in you and ye in him, according to the grace of ourGod, and of [the] Lord Jesus Christ.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Now we beg you, brethren, by the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ and our gathering together to him,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: that ye be not soon shaken in mind, nor troubled, neither by spirit, nor by word, nor by letter, as [if it were] by us, as that the day of the Lord is present.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let not any one deceive you in any manner, because [it will not be] unless the apostasy have first come, and the man of sin have been revealed, the son of perdition;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: who opposes and exalts himself on high against all calledGod, or object of veneration; so that he himself sits down in the temple ofGod, shewing himself that he isGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Do ye not remember that, being yet with you, I said these things to you?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And now ye know that which restrains, that he should be revealed in his own time.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For the mystery of lawlessness already works; only [there is] he who restrains now until he be gone,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and then the lawless one shall be revealed, whom the Lord Jesus shall consume with the breath of his mouth, and shall annul by the appearing of his coming;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: whose coming is according to the working of Satan in all power and signs and wonders of falsehood,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and in all deceit of unrighteousness to them that perish, because they have not received the love of the truth that they might be saved.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And for this reasonGod sends to them a working of error, that they should believe what is false,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: that all might be judged who have not believed the truth, but have found pleasure in unrighteousness.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But we ought to give thanks toGod always for you, brethren beloved of [the] Lord, thatGod has chosen you from [the] beginning to salvation in sanctification of [the] Spirit and belief of [the] truth:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: whereto he has called you by our glad tidings, to [the] obtaining of [the] glory of our Lord Jesus Christ.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: So then, brethren, stand firm, and hold fast the instructions which ye have been taught, whether by word or by our letter.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But our Lord Jesus Christ himself, and ourGod and Father, who has loved us, and given [us] eternal consolation and good hope by grace,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: encourage your hearts, and establish you in every good work and word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For the rest, brethren, pray for us, that the word of the Lord may run and be glorified, even as also with you;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and that we may be delivered from bad and evil men, for faith [is] not [the portion] of all.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But the Lord is faithful, who shall establish you and keep [you] from evil.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But we trust in the Lord as to you, that the things which we enjoin, ye both do and will do.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But the Lord direct your hearts into the love ofGod, and into the patience of the Christ.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Now we enjoin you, brethren, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, that ye withdraw from every brother walking disorderly and not according to the instruction which he received from us.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For ye know yourselves how ye ought to imitate us, because we have not walked disorderly among you;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: nor have we eaten bread from any one without cost; but in toil and hardship working night and day not to be chargeable to any one of you:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: not that we have not the right, but that we might give ourselves as an example to you, in order to your imitating us.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For also when we were with you we enjoined you this, that if any man does not like to work, neither let him eat.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For we hear that [there are] some walking among you disorderly, not working at all, but busybodies.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Now such we enjoin and exhort in [the] Lord Jesus Christ, that working quietly they eat their own bread.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But ye, brethren, do not faint in well-doing.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But if any one obey not our word by the letter, mark that man, and do not keep company with him, that he may be ashamed of himself;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: and do not esteem him as an enemy, but admonish [him] as a brother.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But the Lord of peace himself give you peace continually in every way. The Lord [be] with you all.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The salutation by the hand of me, Paul, which is [the] mark in every letter; so I write.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ [be] with you all.
